title: Bornmuellera glabrescens
taxonomy: Bornmuellera glabrescens is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It is native to the mountainous regions of Eastern Europe and Western Asia. Bornmuellera glabrescens is classified as a member of the tribe Arabideae within the family Brassicaceae. This classification is based on its morphological and molecular characteristics, such as its leaf shape and flower structure. The exact classification of Bornmuellera glabrescens is still a subject of ongoing research and study in the field of botany.
